free_text: Studies of the Energy Dependence of p-O16 Interactions
between 20 and 50 MeV. Measurements of the
Differential Cross Section of Protons Elastically
Energy given is for energy at center of target.
Oxygen gas target contained in a gas cell consisting
of a cylindrical aluminum housing (10.75-in. outer
diameter) having a 2.0-in. wide gap extending around
its wall over 330 deg. This gap is covered on the
outside by a 0.002-in.-thick Kapton H-foil and on the
inside with a similar foil of 0.001 in. thickness.
Protons detected by four single NaI(Tl)
scintillation counters placed immediately behind the
